name: Vladimir Kukresh
message:
Frontend Engineer with 5+ years of experience building high-load web applications and scalable frontend
architectures across e-commerce, fintech (payments), and enterprise operational platforms (analytics
dashboards, order management, reporting systems).
Specialized in React, TypeScript, and modernization of legacy systems (Backbone, jQuery, AngularJS, JSP ->
React) in large production environments.
Experience working on systems serving millions of users, with direct impact on business metrics:
• +10% checkout conversion, reduced failed transactions
• LCP -50%, TTFB -20%
• -40% duplicate API calls, +30% development velocity
Focused on building user-centric solutions that improve conversion, revenue, and user experience.
Experienced in multi-tenant architectures, complex state management (Redux Toolkit, Redux Thunk, RTK
Query), and hybrid SSR systems.
Strong collaboration in distributed cross-functional teams (FE, BE, QA, SRE) with focus on performance,
scalability, and safe migration from legacy to modern stacks.
